ast: min(1)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                          |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                   |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt8([1]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: min(NULL)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | Null { len: 1 }             |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: min(const_int)
evaluation (internal):

| Column    | Data                                                          |

| const_int | Const(Number(5_i32), Number(Int32), 4)                        |
| Output    | NullableColumn { column: Int32([5]), validity: [0b_______1] } |

| const_int_null | Const(Null, Nullable(Number(Int32)), 4)                       |
